Source.Description: The dataset is parts of an online podcast hosted by Liz. Background: Emily, CEO of PairUp, as she takes us along her adventures in industry, startups, and academia. Emily worked on theme park technology at Disney Imagineering, UX research at Facebook (Meta), and led Emerging Tech and Innovation and EF Education First. Emily received her PhD in Technology and Social Behavior from Northwestern! Her startup, PairUp, is a digital mentorship platform all about creating workplace relationships that help everyone grow.
Source.CodingNotes: The research question just represents broad directions you can explore during the open coding process.
